revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 11 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 11 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦5月11日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]_月_日） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（[[745年]]_月_日） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（[[1183年]]_月_日） - [[礪波山の戦い]]（倶利伽羅峠の戦い）。[[源義仲]]が平惟盛に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（[[1274年]]_月_日） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]_月_日） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (元号)|文明]]5年（[[1473年]]_月_日） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（[[1865年]][[6月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月10日 (旧暦)|5月10日]] 翌日[[5月12日 (旧暦)|5月12日]] - 前月[[4月11日 (旧暦)|4月11日]] 翌月[[6月11日 (旧暦)|6月11日]] *新暦[[5月11日]]
{{msg:stub}}

'''旧暦5月11日'''は[[旧暦]][[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[708年]]_月_日） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（[[745年]]_月_日） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（[[1183年]]_月_日） - [[礪波山の戦い]]（倶利伽羅峠の戦い）。[[源義仲]]が平惟盛に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（[[1274年]]_月_日） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（[[1576年]]_月_日） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (元号)|文明]]5年（[[1473年]]_月_日） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（[[1865年]][[6月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{旧暦360日}} *前日[[5月10日 (旧暦)|5月10日]] 翌日[[5月12日 (旧暦)|5月12日]] - 前月[[4月11日 (旧暦)|4月11日]] 翌月[[6月11日 (旧暦)|6月11日]] *新暦[[5月11日]]
{{stub}}

{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月11日'''は[[5月 (旧暦)|5月]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - [[礪波山の戦い]]（倶利伽羅峠の戦い）。[[源義仲]]が平惟盛に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (元号)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[6月4日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦[[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）

== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）

Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days

revision.text:
'''May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 11'''<!--Lunar May11--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar May]][[sn:May 11日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先負]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

'''May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar May}} ''May 11'''<!--Lunar May11--> is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 11'''<!--Lunar May11 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== Commemorations ==

I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

adding korean to all the dates

removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[和銅]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[708]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1865]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]]） * 慶応1st year（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

[[sn:May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[和銅]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[708]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1274]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1865]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]]） * 慶応1st year（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[和銅]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[708]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1183]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1274]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1865]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]]） * 慶応1st year（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829]]） * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.

[[sn:May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[和銅]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[708]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17th year（ユリウス暦[[745]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1183]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11th year（ユリウス暦[[1274]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4th year（ユリウス暦[[1576]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5th year（ユリウス暦[[1473]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1865]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]]） * 慶応1st year（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829]]） * [[明治]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1869]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835]]）

== Events == * [[和銅]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[708]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[745]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1183]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1274]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1576]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る

== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1473]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1865]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]]） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829]]） * [[明治]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1869]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[和銅]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[708]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]]17th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[745]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[Juei]]2nd year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1183]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1274]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1576]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5th year ([[Julian Calendar]] [[1473]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430]]） * [[慶応]]1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1865]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]]） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian Calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829]]） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]]2nd year ([[Gregorian Calendar]] [[1869]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835]]）

== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[6月6日]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[7月3日]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[6月20日]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が都を[[平城京]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[源義仲]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[日蓮]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が都を[[平城京]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[源義仲]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[日蓮]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[聖武天皇]] が都を[[平城京]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[源義仲]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[日蓮]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages to be translated]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[平城京]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[源義仲]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、尊攘派志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[文永]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] 天守閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ） == See Also ==

== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] Tenshu閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 11일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] [[zh:五月十一]] [[en:draft:May 11 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] Tenshu閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] Tenshu閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る
== Births ==
== Deaths == * [[Bunmei]] 5th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1473]] [[June 6]] ） - [[細川勝元]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1430]] ） * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応}} 1st year（閏5月）（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1865]] [[July 3]] ） - [[岡田以蔵]] 、Sonnō jōi faction志士（* [[1838]] ） * 慶応1st year（閏5月） ([[Gregorian calendar]] 1865th year 7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]] （武市半平太）、[[Sonnō jōi faction]] 志士（* [[1829]] ） * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1869]] [[June 20]] ） - [[土方歳三]] 、[[新選組]] 副長（* [[1835]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[708]] [[June 3]] ） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]] を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[745]] [[June 15]] ） - [[Emperor Shōmu]] が都を[[Heijō-kyō]] に戻す * [[Juei]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1183]] [[June 2]] ） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]] ）。[[Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] が[[平維盛]] に勝利 * [[Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1274]] [[June 16]] ） - [[Nichiren]] が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]] へ * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 4th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1576]] [[June 7]] ） - [[安土城]] Tenshu閣が完成。[[Oda Nobunaga]] が岐阜城から移る

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|de|708|ja|708|zh|708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3}}) – Minted Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|和同開珎|de|和同開珎|ja|和同開珎|zh|和同開珎}}; in August, issued a practical copper currency. * {{ill|Tenpyō|de|Tenpyō|ja|Tenpyō|zh|Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|de|745|ja|745|zh|745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15}}) – {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|de|Emperor Shōmu|ja|Emperor Shōmu|zh|Emperor Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|de|Heijō-kyō|ja|Heijō-kyō|zh|Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|de|Juei|ja|Juei|zh|Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|de|1183|ja|1183|zh|1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|倶利伽羅峠の戦い|de|倶利伽羅峠の戦い|ja|倶利伽羅峠の戦い|zh|倶利伽羅峠の戦い}}); {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|de|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|zh|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeated {{ill|平維盛|de|平維盛|ja|平維盛|zh|平維盛}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|de|Bun'ei|ja|Bun'ei|zh|Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|de|1274|ja|1274|zh|1274}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16}}) – {{ill|Nichiren|de|Nichiren|ja|Nichiren|zh|Nichiren}} left Kamakura for {{ill|身延山|de|身延山|ja|身延山|zh|身延山}} at the invitation of his followers. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|de|1576|ja|1576|zh|1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7}}) – The Tenshu tower of {{ill|安土城|de|安土城|ja|安土城|zh|安土城}} was completed; {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|Oda Nobunaga|zh|Oda Nobunaga}} moved from {{ill|岐阜城|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城}}.
== Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|de|Bunmei|ja|Bunmei|zh|Bunmei}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|Julian calendar|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|de|1473|ja|1473|zh|1473}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6}}) – {{ill|細川勝元|de|細川勝元|ja|細川勝元|zh|細川勝元}}, {{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1430|de|1430|ja|1430|zh|1430}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|岡田以蔵|de|岡田以蔵|ja|岡田以蔵|zh|岡田以蔵}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|武市瑞山|de|武市瑞山|ja|武市瑞山|zh|武市瑞山}} (also known as 武市半平太), a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|de|1829|ja|1829|zh|1829}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|de|Meiji era|ja|Meiji era|zh|Meiji era|lt=Meiji|lt_ja=Meiji|lt_de=Meiji|lt_zh=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|Gregorian calendar|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|de|1869|ja|1869|zh|1869}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20}}) – {{ill|土方歳三|de|土方歳三|ja|土方歳三|zh|土方歳三}}, vice-commander of {{ill|新選組|de|新選組|ja|新選組|zh|新選組}} (born {{ill|1835|de|1835|ja|1835|zh|1835}}).

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|de|708|ja|708|zh|708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadō Kaikin|de|和同開珎|ja|和同開珎|zh|和同開珎}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|de|Tenpyō|ja|天平|zh|Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|de|745|ja|745|zh|745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15}}) – Emperor {{ill|Shōmu|de|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|zh|Emperor Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|de|Heijō-kyō|ja|平城京|zh|Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|de|Juei|ja|寿永|zh|Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|de|1183|ja|1183|zh|1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Tsurinawa no Tatakai|ja|倶利伽羅峠の戦い}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|de|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲|zh|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Yoshiakira|de|Taira no Yoshiakira|ja|平維盛|zh|平維盛}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|de|Bun'ei|ja|文永|zh|Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|de|1274|ja|1274|zh|1274}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|de|Nichiren|ja|日蓮|zh|Nichiren}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|de|1576|ja|1576|zh|1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|de|安土城|ja|安土城|zh|安土城}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|zh|Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城}}.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|ja|文明|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|de|1473|ja|1473|zh|1473}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|de|細川勝元|ja|細川勝元|zh|細川勝元}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|de|1430|ja|1430|zh|1430}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|de|岡田以蔵|ja|岡田以蔵|zh|岡田以蔵}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|de|武市瑞山|ja|武市瑞山|zh|武市瑞山}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|de|1829|ja|1829|zh|1829}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|lt=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|de|1869|ja|1869|zh|1869}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|de|土方歳三|ja|土方歳三|zh|土方歳三}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|de|新選組|ja|新選組|zh|新選組}} (born {{ill|1835|de|1835|ja|1835|zh|1835}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|de|708|ja|708|zh|708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadō Kaikin|de|和同開珎|ja|和同開珎|zh|和同開珎}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|de|Tenpyō|ja|天平|zh|Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|de|745|ja|745|zh|745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15}}) – Emperor {{ill|Shōmu|de|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|zh|Emperor Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|de|Heijō-kyō|ja|平城京|zh|Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|de|Juei|ja|寿永|zh|Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|de|1183|ja|1183|zh|1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Tsurinawa no Tatakai|ja|倶利伽羅峠の戦い}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|de|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲|zh|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Yoshiakira|de|Taira no Yoshiakira|ja|平維盛|zh|平維盛}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|de|Bun'ei|ja|文永|zh|Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|de|1274|ja|1274|zh|1274}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|de|Nichiren|ja|日蓮|zh|Nichiren}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|de|1576|ja|1576|zh|1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|de|安土城|ja|安土城|zh|安土城}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|zh|Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城}}.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|ja|文明|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|de|1473|ja|1473|zh|1473}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|de|細川勝元|ja|細川勝元|zh|細川勝元}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|de|1430|ja|1430|zh|1430}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|de|岡田以蔵|ja|岡田以蔵|zh|岡田以蔵}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|de|武市瑞山|ja|武市瑞山|zh|武市瑞山}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|de|1829|ja|1829|zh|1829}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|lt=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|de|1869|ja|1869|zh|1869}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|de|土方歳三|ja|土方歳三|zh|土方歳三}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|de|新選組|ja|新選組|zh|新選組}} (born {{ill|1835|de|1835|ja|1835|zh|1835}}).

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|de|708|ja|708|zh|708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadō Kaikin|de|和同開珎|ja|和同開珎|zh|和同開珎}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|de|Tenpyō|ja|天平|zh|Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|de|745|ja|745|zh|745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15}}) – Emperor {{ill|Shōmu|de|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|zh|Emperor Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|de|Heijō-kyō|ja|平城京|zh|Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|de|Juei|ja|寿永|zh|Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|de|1183|ja|1183|zh|1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Tsurinawa no Tatakai|ja|倶利伽羅峠の戦い}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|de|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲|zh|Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Yoshiakira|de|Taira no Yoshiakira|ja|平維盛|zh|平維盛}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|de|Bun'ei|ja|文永|zh|Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|de|1274|ja|1274|zh|1274}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|de|Nichiren|ja|日蓮|zh|Nichiren}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|de|1576|ja|1576|zh|1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|de|安土城|ja|安土城|zh|安土城}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|zh|Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城}}.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|ja|文明|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|de|1473|ja|1473|zh|1473}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|de|細川勝元|ja|細川勝元|zh|細川勝元}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|de|1430|ja|1430|zh|1430}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|de|岡田以蔵|ja|岡田以蔵|zh|岡田以蔵}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3}}) – {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|de|武市瑞山|ja|武市瑞山|zh|武市瑞山}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|de|1829|ja|1829|zh|1829}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|lt=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|de|1869|ja|1869|zh|1869}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|de|土方歳三|ja|土方歳三|zh|土方歳三}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|de|新選組|ja|新選組|zh|新選組}} (born {{ill|1835|de|1835|ja|1835|zh|1835}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|de|Tenpyō|ja|天平|zh|Tenpyō|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|745|de|745|ja|745|zh|745|12=draft}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=draft}}) – Emperor {{ill|Shōmu|de|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|zh|Emperor Shōmu|12=draft}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|de|Heijō-kyō|ja|平城京|zh|Heijō-kyō|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Juei|de|Juei|ja|寿永|zh|Juei|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1183|de|1183|ja|1183|zh|1183|12=draft}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=draft}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Tsurinawa no Tatakai|ja|倶利伽羅峠の戦い|12=draft}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|de|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲|zh|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=draft}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Yoshiakira|de|Taira no Yoshiakira|ja|平維盛|zh|平維盛|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|de|Bun'ei|ja|文永|zh|Bun'ei|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1274|de|1274|ja|1274|zh|1274|12=draft}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=draft}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|de|Nichiren|ja|日蓮|zh|Nichiren|12=draft}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1576|de|1576|ja|1576|zh|1576|12=draft}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=draft}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|de|安土城|ja|安土城|zh|安土城|12=draft}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|zh|Oda Nobunaga|12=draft}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城|12=draft}}.

== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|ja|文明|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1473|de|1473|ja|1473|zh|1473|12=draft}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|de|細川勝元|ja|細川勝元|zh|細川勝元|12=draft}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|de|1430|ja|1430|zh|1430|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|de|岡田以蔵|ja|岡田以蔵|zh|岡田以蔵|12=draft}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|de|武市瑞山|ja|武市瑞山|zh|武市瑞山|12=draft}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|de|1829|ja|1829|zh|1829|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|lt=Meiji|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1869|de|1869|ja|1869|zh|1869|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|de|土方歳三|ja|土方歳三|zh|土方歳三|12=draft}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|de|新選組|ja|新選組|zh|新選組|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1835|de|1835|ja|1835|zh|1835|12=draft}}).

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月十一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō|ja|和銅|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|708|de|708|ja|708|zh|708|12=draft}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=draft}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadō Kaikin|de|和同開珎|ja|和同開珎|zh|和同開珎|12=draft}}, was minted; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|zh|Oda Nobunaga|12=draft}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城|12=draft}}.

later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|de|Tenpyō|ja|天平|zh|Tenpyō|12=draft}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|745|de|745|ja|745|zh|745|12=draft}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=draft}}) – Emperor {{ill|Shōmu|de|Emperor Shōmu|ja|聖武天皇|zh|Emperor Shōmu|12=draft}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|de|Heijō-kyō|ja|平城京|zh|Heijō-kyō|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Juei|de|Juei|ja|寿永|zh|Juei|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1183|de|1183|ja|1183|zh|1183|12=draft}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=draft}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Tsurinawa no Tatakai|ja|倶利伽羅峠の戦い|12=draft}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|de|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|ja|源義仲|zh|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|12=draft}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Yoshiakira|de|Taira no Yoshiakira|ja|平維盛|zh|平維盛|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|de|Bun'ei|ja|文永|zh|Bun'ei|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1274|de|1274|ja|1274|zh|1274|12=draft}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=draft}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|de|Nichiren|ja|日蓮|zh|Nichiren|12=draft}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era|12=draft|12=draft}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1576|de|1576|ja|1576|zh|1576|12=draft}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=draft}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|de|安土城|ja|安土城|zh|安土城|12=draft}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|de|Oda Nobunaga|ja|織田信長|zh|Oda Nobunaga|12=draft}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|de|岐阜城|ja|岐阜城|zh|岐阜城|12=draft}}.
== Births == <!-- No births listed -->
== Deaths == * {{ill|Bunmei|ja|文明|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|Julian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1473|de|1473|ja|1473|zh|1473|12=draft}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|de|細川勝元|ja|細川勝元|zh|細川勝元|12=draft}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|de|1430|ja|1430|zh|1430|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|de|岡田以蔵|ja|岡田以蔵|zh|岡田以蔵|12=draft}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Keiō|ja|慶応|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1865|de|1865|ja|1865|zh|1865|12=draft}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Takechi Zuizan|de|武市瑞山|ja|武市瑞山|zh|武市瑞山|12=draft}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|de|1829|ja|1829|zh|1829|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|lt=Meiji|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|Gregorian calendar|12=draft}} {{ill|1869|de|1869|ja|1869|zh|1869|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|de|土方歳三|ja|土方歳三|zh|土方歳三|12=draft}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|de|新選組|ja|新選組|zh|新選組|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1835|de|1835|ja|1835|zh|1835|12=draft}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月11日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の11日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[和銅]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[708年]][[6月3日]]） - 日本初の国産貨幣である銀銭[[和同開珎]]を鋳造。8月に銅製の実用通貨を発行 * [[天平]]17年（ユリウス暦[[745年]][[6月15日]]） - [[聖武天皇]]が都を[[平城京]]に戻す * [[寿永]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1183年]][[6月2日]]） - 礪波山の戦い（[[倶利伽羅峠の戦い]]）。[[源義仲]]が[[平維盛]]に勝利 * [[文永]]11年（ユリウス暦[[1274年]][[6月16日]]） - [[日蓮]]が信奉者の招きにより鎌倉を去り[[身延山]]へ * [[天正]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1576年]][[6月7日]]） - [[安土城]]天守閣が完成。[[織田信長]]が岐阜城から移る
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[文明 (日本)|文明]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1473年]][[6月6日]]） - [[細川勝元]]、[[武将]]（* [[1430年]]） * [[慶応]]元年（閏5月）（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1865年]][[7月3日]]） - [[岡田以蔵]]、尊攘派志士（* [[1838年]]） * 慶応元年（閏5月）（グレゴリオ暦1865年7月3日） - [[武市瑞山]]（武市半平太）、[[尊攘派]]志士（* [[1829年]]） * [[明治]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1869年]][[6月20日]]） - [[土方歳三]]、[[新選組]]副長（* [[1835年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q839608]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 11|qq=May 11}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}.
