== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839608]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 11|qq=May 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Wadō (era)|Wadō]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:708|708]] {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin [[:en:Wadōkaichin|Wadō Kaikin]], was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * [[:en:Tenpyō|Tenpyō]] 17th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:745|745]] {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor [[:en:Emperor Shōmu|Shōmu]] restored the capital to [[:en:Heijō-kyō|Heijō-kyō]]. * [[:en:Juei|Juei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1183|1183]] {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ([[:en:Battle of Kurikara Pass|Tsurinawa no Tatakai]]) took place, with [[:en:Minamoto no Yoshinaka|Minamoto no Yoshinaka]] defeating [[:en:Taira no Koremori|Taira no Yoshiakira]]. * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bun'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1274|1274]] {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk [[:en:Nichiren|Nichiren]] was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 4th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1576|1576]] {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of [[:en:Azuchi Castle|Azuchi Castle]] was completed; shortly thereafter, [[:en:Oda Nobunaga|Oda Nobunaga]] relocated from [[:en:Gifu Castle|Gifu Castle]]. == Births ==
== Deaths == * [[:en:Civilization|Bunmei]] 5th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1473|1473]] {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hosokawa Katsumoto|Hosokawa Katsumoto]], a military commander (born [[:en:1430|1430]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Okada Izō|Okada Izō]], a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1838|1838]]). * [[:en:Keiō|Keiō]] 1st year (leap May) ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1865|1865]] {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Takechi Hanpeita|Takechi Zuizan]], also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born [[:en:1829|1829]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – [[:en:Hijikata Toshizō|Hijikata Toshizō]], the vice-commander of the [[:en:Shinsengumi|Shinsengumi]] (born [[:en:1835|1835]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月十一]][[zh:五月十一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839608]] Wikidata name: 11th day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:05, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 11|qq=May 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|en|708|WD=Q23511|lt=708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadōkaichin|en|Wadōkaichin|WD=Q3565040|lt=Wadō Kaikin}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|en|745|WD=Q23612|lt=745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|en|Heijō-kyō|WD=Q862509|lt=Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|WD=Q598057|lt=Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|en|1183|WD=Q19723|lt=1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Battle of Kurikara Pass|en|Battle of Kurikara Pass|WD=Q2889028|lt=Tsurinawa no Tatakai}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|WD=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Koremori|en|Taira no Koremori|WD=Q3055506|lt=Taira no Yoshiakira}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|en|1274|WD=Q5527|lt=1274}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|en|Nichiren|WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|en|Azuchi Castle|WD=Q786888|lt=Azuchi Castle}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|en|Gifu Castle|WD=Q1367052|lt=Gifu Castle}}. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|WD=Q8432|lt=Bunmei}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|en|1473|WD=Q6594|lt=1473}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|en|Hosokawa Katsumoto|WD=Q740354|lt=Hosokawa Katsumoto}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|en|1430|WD=Q6342|lt=1430}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|en|Okada Izō|WD=Q3058220|lt=Okada Izō}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takechi Zuizan}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|en|Hijikata Toshizō|WD=Q701182|lt=Hijikata Toshizō}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi}} (born {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|10|5|12|4|11|6|5|0511|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.

3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadōkaichin|en|Wadōkaichin|WD=Q3565040|lt=Wadō Kaikin}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|en|745|WD=Q23612|lt=745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June no Tatakai}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|WD=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Koremori|en|Taira no Koremori|WD=Q3055506|lt=Taira {{Not to be confused with|May 11|qq=May 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|en|708|WD=Q23511|lt=708|1=708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadōkaichin|en|Wadōkaichin|WD=Q3565040|lt=Wadō Kaikin|1=Wadōkaichin}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|en|745|WD=Q23612|lt=745|1=745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|en|Heijō-kyō|WD=Q862509|lt=Heijō-kyō|1=Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|WD=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|en|1183|WD=Q19723|lt=1183|1=1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Battle of Kurikara Pass|en|Battle of Kurikara Pass|WD=Q2889028|lt=Tsurinawa no Tatakai|1=Battle of Kurikara Pass}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|WD=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Koremori|en|Taira no Koremori|WD=Q3055506|lt=Taira no Yoshiakira|1=Taira no Koremori}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1274|en|1274|WD=Q5527|lt=1274|1=1274}} {{ill|June 16|de|June 16|ja|June 16|zh|June 16|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 16|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Exiled monk {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576|1=1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June 7|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 7|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Tenshu (main tower) of {{ill|Azuchi Castle|en|Azuchi Castle|WD=Q786888|lt=Azuchi Castle|1=Azuchi Castle}} was completed; shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|en|Gifu Castle|WD=Q1367052|lt=Gifu Castle|1=Gifu Castle}}. == Births ==
== Deaths == * {{ill|Civilization|en|Civilization|WD=Q8432|lt=Bunmei|1=Civilization}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1473|en|1473|WD=Q6594|lt=1473|1=1473}} {{ill|June 6|de|June 6|ja|June 6|zh|June 6|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 6|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Katsumoto|en|Hosokawa Katsumoto|WD=Q740354|lt=Hosokawa Katsumoto|1=Hosokawa Katsumoto}}, a military commander (born {{ill|1430|en|1430|WD=Q6342|lt=1430|1=1430}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Okada Izō|en|Okada Izō|WD=Q3058220|lt=Okada Izō|1=Okada Izō}}, a Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838|1=1838}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|WD=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year (leap May) ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|July 3|de|July 3|ja|July 3|zh|July 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Takechi Hanpeita|en|Takechi Hanpeita|WD=Q1074298|lt=Takechi Zuizan|1=Takechi Hanpeita}}, also known as Takechi Hanpeita, another Sonnō jōi faction activist (born {{ill|1829|en|1829|WD=Q7572|lt=1829|1=1829}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji|1=Meiji era}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|WD=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|June 20|de|June 20|ja|June 20|zh|June 20|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 20|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – {{ill|Hijikata Toshizō|en|Hijikata Toshizō|WD=Q701182|lt=Hijikata Toshizō|1=Hijikata Toshizō}}, the vice-commander of the {{ill|Shinsengumi|en|Shinsengumi|WD=Q221031|lt=Shinsengumi|1=Shinsengumi}} (born {{ill|1835|en|1835|WD=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}}).

== Events == * {{ill|Wadō (era)|en|Wadō (era)|WD=Q1373026|lt=Wadō|1=Wadō (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|708|en|708|WD=Q23511|lt=708|1=708}} {{ill|June 3|de|June 3|ja|June 3|zh|June 3|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 3|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Japan’s first domestically produced coin, the silver coin {{ill|Wadōkaichin|en|Wadōkaichin|WD=Q3565040|lt=Wadō Kaikin|1=Wadōkaichin}}, was minted; later in August, a practical copper currency was issued. * {{ill|Tenpyō|en|Tenpyō|WD=Q1199879|lt=Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō}} 17th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|745|en|745|WD=Q23612|lt=745|1=745}} {{ill|June 15|de|June 15|ja|June 15|zh|June 15|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 15|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Shōmu|en|Emperor Shōmu|WD=Q349263|lt=Shōmu|1=Emperor Shōmu}} restored the capital to {{ill|Heijō-kyō|en|Heijō-kyō|WD=Q862509|lt=Heijō-kyō|1=Heijō-kyō}}. * {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|WD=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1183|en|1183|WD=Q19723|lt=1183|1=1183}} {{ill|June 2|de|June 2|ja|June 2|zh|June 2|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June 2|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) – The Battle of Tsurinawa Mountain ({{ill|Battle of Kurikara Pass|en|Battle of Kurikara Pass|WD=Q2889028|lt=Tsurinawa no Tatakai|1=Battle of Kurikara Pass}}) took place, with {{ill|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|en|Minamoto no Yoshinaka|WD=Q1139202|lt=Minamoto no Yoshinaka|1=Minamoto no Yoshinaka}} defeating {{ill|Taira no Koremori|en|Taira no Koremori|WD=Q3055506|lt=Taira no Yoshiakira|1=Taira no Koremori}}. * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bun'ei|1=Bun'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478en|Nichiren|1=Nichiren|2=ja|3=日蓮|4=ko|5=니치렌|6=de|7=Nichiren|8=es|9=Nichiren|10=fr|11=Nichiren|12=it|13=Nichiren|14=nl|15=Nichiren|16=no|17=Nichiren|lt=Nichiren|WD=Q311478WD=Q311478|lt=Nichiren}} was pardoned by the bakufu and left Kamakura for 【Minobu-san|身延山】. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1576|en|1576|WD=Q6700|lt=1576|1=1576}} {{ill|June 7|de|June 7|ja|June 7|zh|June shortly thereafter, {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|WD=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} relocated from {{ill|Gifu Castle|en|Gifu Castle|WD=Q1367052|lt=Gifu Castle|1=Gifu Castle}}. == Births
